name: AlertNotice
description: Inline alert message communicating status, errors, warnings, or success. Always visible (not triggered by user interaction).

members.name: status
members.description: Status severity of the alert notice

members.name: level
members.description: Display level affecting layout and emphasis

members.name: dismissible
members.description: Whether the alert notice can be dismissed by the user

members.name: onDismiss
members.description: Called when the user clicks the dismiss control. Required surface for `dismissible`; consumers handle removing/hiding the notice.

members.name: dismissLabel
members.description: Accessible label for the dismiss control. Defaults to "Dismiss".

members.name: icon
members.description: Optional icon node rendered before the alert content

usageHints: Use variant=error when a form submission or action failed
Use variant=warning for recoverable issues that need attention
Use variant=success after a positive outcome
Avoid using for transient notifications — use Toast instead
